src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_0: Pounds the foe with\nforelegs or tail.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_1: A chopping attack with a\nhigh critical-hit ratio.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_2: Repeatedly slaps the foe\n2 to 5 times.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_3: Repeatedly punches the foe\n2 to 5 times.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_4: A strong punch thrown with\nincredible power.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_5: Throws coins at the foe.\nMoney is recovered after.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_6: A fiery punch that may burn\nthe foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_7: An icy punch that may\nfreeze the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_8: An electrified punch that\nmay paralyze the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_10: Grips the foe with large and\npowerful pincers.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_11: A powerful pincer attack\nthat may cause fainting.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_12: A 2-turn move that strikes\nthe foe on the 2nd turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_13: A fighting dance that\nsharply raises ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_14: Cuts the foe with sharp\nscythes, claws, etc.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_15: Strikes the foe with a gust\nof wind whipped up by wings.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_16: Strikes the foe with wings\nspread wide.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_17: Blows away the foe with\nwind and ends the battle.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_18: Flies up on the first turn,\nthen strikes the next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_19: Binds and squeezes the foe\nfor 2 to 5 turns.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_20: Slams the foe with a long\ntail, vine, etc.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_21: Strikes the foe with\nslender, whiplike vines.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_22: Stomps the enemy with a big\nfoot. May cause flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_23: A double-kicking attack\nthat strikes the foe twice.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_24: An extremely powerful kick\nwith intense force.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_25: A strong jumping kick. May\nmiss and hurt the kicker.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_26: A fast kick delivered from\na rapid spin.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_27: Reduces the foe's accuracy\nby hurling sand in its face.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_28: A ramming attack that may\ncause flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_30: Jabs the foe 2 to 5 times\nwith sharp horns, etc.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_31: A one-hit KO attack that\nuses a horn like a drill.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_32: Charges the foe with a full-\nbody tackle.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_33: A full-body slam that may\ncause paralysis.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_34: Wraps and squeezes the foe\n2 to 5 times with vines, etc.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_35: A reckless charge attack\nthat also hurts the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_36: A rampage of 2 to 3 turns\nthat confuses the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_37: A life-risking tackle that\nalso hurts the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_38: Wags the tail to lower the\nfoe's DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_39: A toxic attack with barbs,\netc., that may poison.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_40: Stingers on the forelegs\njab the foe twice.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_41: Sharp pins are fired to\nstrike 2 to 5 times.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_42: Frightens the foe with a\nleer to lower DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_43: Bites with vicious fangs.\nMay cause flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_44: Growls cutely to reduce the\nfoe's ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_45: Makes the foe flee to end\nthe battle.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_46: A soothing song lulls the\nfoe into a deep slumber.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_47: Emits bizarre sound waves\nthat may confuse the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_48: Launches shock waves that\nalways inflict 20 HP damage.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_49: Psychically disables one of\nthe foe's moves.

src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_53: Creates a mist that stops\nreduction of abilities.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_55: Blasts water at high power\nto strike the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_56: Creates a huge wave, then\ncrashes it down on the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_57: Blasts the foe with an icy\nbeam that may freeze it.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_58: Hits the foe with an icy\nstorm that may freeze it.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_59: Fires a peculiar ray that\nmay confuse the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_60: Forcefully sprays bubbles\nthat may lower SPEED.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_61: Fires a rainbow-colored\nbeam that may lower ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_62: Powerful, but leaves the\nuser immobile the next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_63: Attacks the foe with a\njabbing beak, etc.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_64: A corkscrewing attack with\nthe beak acting as a drill.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_65: A reckless body slam that\nalso hurts the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_66: A kick that inflicts more\ndamage on heavier foes.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_67: Retaliates any physical hit\nwith double the power.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_68: Inflicts damage identical\nto the user's level.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_69: Builds enormous power,\nthen slams the foe.

src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_76: Scatters a toxic powder\nthat may poison the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_77: Scatters a powder that may\nparalyze the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_78: Scatters a powder that may\ncause the foe to sleep.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_79: A rampage of 2 to 3 turns\nthat confuses the user.

src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_81: Launches shock waves that\nalways inflict 40 HP damage.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_82: Traps the foe in a ring of\nfire for 2 to 5 turns.

src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_91: Poisons the foe with an\nintensifying toxin.

src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_243: Copies the foe's effect(s)\nand gives to the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_245: An attack that may raise\nall stats.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_246: Hurls a black blob that may\nlower the foe's SP. DEF.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_247: Heightens inner power to\nstrike 2 turns later.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_248: A rock-crushing attack\nthat may lower DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_249: Traps and hurts the foe in\na whirlpool for 2 to 5 turns.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_250: Summons party POKéMON to\njoin in the attack.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_252: Causes an uproar for 2 to 5\nturns and prevents sleep.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_253: Charges up power for up to\n3 turns.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_254: Releases stockpiled power\n(the more the better).
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_256: Exhales a hot breath on the\nfoe. May inflict a burn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_257: Summons a hailstorm that\nstrikes every turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_258: Torments the foe and stops\nsuccessive use of a move.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_259: Confuses the foe, but\nraises its SP. ATK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_260: Inflicts a burn on the foe\nwith intense fire.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_261: The user faints and lowers\nthe foe's abilities.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_262: Boosts ATTACK when burned,\nparalyzed, or poisoned.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_263: A powerful loyalty attack.\nThe user flinches if hit.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_264: Powerful against paralyzed\nfoes, but also heals them.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_265: Draws attention to make\nfoes attack only the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_266: The type of attack varies\ndepending on the location.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_267: Charges power to boost the\nelectric move used next.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_268: Taunts the foe into only\nusing attack moves.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_269: Boosts the power of the\nrecipient's moves.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_270: Tricks the foe into trading\nheld items.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_271: Mimics the target and\ncopies its special ability.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_272: A wish that restores HP.\nIt takes time to work.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_273: Attacks randomly with one\nof the partner's moves.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_274: Lays roots that restore HP.\nThe user can't switch out.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_276: Reflects special effects\nback to the attacker.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_277: Recycles a used item for\none more use.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_278: An attack that gains power\nif injured by the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_279: Destroys barriers such as\nREFLECT and causes damage.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_280: Lulls the foe into yawning,\nthen sleeping next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_281: Knocks down the foe's held\nitem to prevent its use.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_282: Gains power if the user's HP\nis lower than the foe's HP.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_283: The higher the user's HP,\nthe more damage caused.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_284: The user swaps special\nabilities with the target.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_285: Prevents foes from using\nmoves known by the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_287: If the user faints, deletes\nthe PP of the final move.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_288: Steals the effects of the\nmove the foe uses next.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_289: An attack with effects\nthat vary by location.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_290: Dives underwater the first\nturn and strikes next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_291: Straight-arm punches that\nstrike the foe 2 to 5 times.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_292: Alters the POKéMON's type\ndepending on the location.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_293: Flashes a light that sharply\nraises SP. ATK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_294: Attacks with a burst of\nlight. May lower SP. DEF.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_295: Attacks with a flurry of\ndown. May lower SP. ATK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_296: Envelops the foe with down\nto sharply reduce ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_298: A kick with a high critical-\nhit ratio. May cause a burn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_299: Covers the user in mud to\nraise electrical resistance.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_300: A 5-turn attack that gains\npower on successive hits.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_301: Attacks with thorny arms.\nMay cause flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_302: Slacks off and restores\nhalf the maximum HP.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_303: A loud attack that uses\nsound waves to injure.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_304: A sharp-fanged attack.\nMay badly poison the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_305: Tears at the foe with sharp\nclaws. May lower DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_306: Powerful, but leaves the\nuser immobile the next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_307: Powerful, but leaves the\nuser immobile the next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_308: Fires a meteor-like punch.\nMay raise ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_309: An attack that may shock\nthe foe into flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_310: The move's type and power\nchange with the weather.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_311: Heals all status problems\nwith a soothing scent.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_312: Feigns crying to sharply\nlower the foe's SP. DEF.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_313: Hacks with razorlike wind.\nHigh critical-hit ratio.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_314: Allows a full-power attack,\nbut sharply lowers SP. ATK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_315: Negates the foe's efforts\nto heighten evasiveness.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_316: Stops the foe from moving\nwith rocks and cuts SPEED.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_317: A powdery attack that may\nraise abilities.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_318: Emits a horrible screech\nthat sharply lowers SP. DEF.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_319: Lulls the foe into sleep\nwith a pleasant melody.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_320: Makes the foe laugh to\nlower ATTACK and DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_321: Raises DEFENSE and SP. DEF\nwith a mystic power.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_322: Inflicts more damage if the\nuser's HP is high.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_323: A strange beam attack that\nmay confuse the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_324: An unavoidable punch that\nis thrown from shadows.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_325: Attacks with a peculiar\npower. May cause flinching.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_326: An uppercut thrown as if\nleaping into the sky.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_327: Traps and hurts the foe in\nquicksand for 2 to 5 turns.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_328: A chilling attack that\ncauses fainting if it hits.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_329: Attacks with muddy water.\nMay lower accuracy.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_330: Shoots 2 to 5 seeds in a row\nto strike the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_332: Attacks the foe by firing\n2 to 5 icicles in a row.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_333: Hardens the body's surface\nto sharply raise DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_334: Blocks the foe's way to\nprevent escape.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_335: Howls to raise the spirit\nand boosts ATTACK.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_337: Powerful, but leaves the\nuser immobile the next turn.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_338: Bulks up the body to boost\nboth ATTACK and DEFENSE.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_339: Bounces up, then down the\nnext turn. May paralyze.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_340: Hurls mud at the foe and\nreduces SPEED.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_341: Has a high critical-hit\nratio. May also poison.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_342: Cutely begs to obtain an\nitem held by the foe.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_343: A life-risking tackle that\nslightly hurts the user.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_344: Attacks with a strange leaf\nthat cannot be evaded.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_345: The user becomes soaked to\nraise resistance to fire.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_346: Raises SP. ATK and SP. DEF\nby focusing the mind.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_347: Slashes with a sharp leaf.\nHigh critical-hit ratio.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_348: A mystical dance that ups\nATTACK and SPEED.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_349: Hurls boulders at the foe\n2 to 5 times in a row.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_351: Attacks with ultrasonic\nwaves. May confuse the foe
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_352: Summons strong sunlight to\nattack 2 turns later.
src_data_text_move_descriptions_en.h.string_353: Allows a full-power attack,\nbut sharply lowers SP. ATK.
